conclusion: On the antibody-antigen OOD regime, ipTM->DockQ falls 0.84->0.61 (mild miscalibration) but the general-fit gate degrades gracefully (within ~0.03 of the in-regime oracle gate) and still beats trust-all; the LLM ties (lambda=0.5) or loses (lambda=0.8) to the gate. The enforced gate is robust out-of-distribution.
